scenes.narration: In the Mahabharata, Emperor Yudhisthira faced an impossible test that would reveal the deepest truth of dharma.
scenes.image_prompt: Ancient palace courtroom, Yudhisthira on throne surrounded by Kauravas, dramatic Indian miniature painting style, heavy golden borders, tense atmosphere, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The game of dice had stripped him of his kingdom, his brothers, and even his wife Draupadi.
scenes.image_prompt: Yudhisthira looking stunned, dice on the floor, Draupadi in background weeping, classical Indian art style with deep reds and golds, comic panel borders, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Duryodhana smiled and made one final offer - name one brother to be returned, and lose him forever if you lose again.
scenes.image_prompt: Duryodhana pointing dramatically, evil smile, Yudhisthira looking horrified, dramatic shadow vs light, classic Rajasthani miniature style, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The entire courtroom fell silent. Sahadeva lay closest - his youngest brother, twin to Nakula.
scenes.image_prompt: Sahadeva lying on ground, Yudhisthira kneeling beside him, courtiers watching silently, dark atmospheric lighting, traditional Indian fresco style, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But Yudhisthira's mind traveled deeper. A true ruler sees not just what is seen, but what must be protected.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of Yudhisthira's face, eyes looking upward in deep thought, divine light from above, traditional art with ornate borders, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: He thought of his mother Kunti's command - to protect both Sahadeva and Nakula equally as his own eyes.
scenes.image_prompt: Yudhisthira with eyes closed, flashback visual of Kunti blessing both twins, spiritual golden aura, comic panel style transitioning, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: If he chose Sahadeva, Nakula would be left unprotected - losing half of his duty to his mother's wish.
scenes.image_prompt: Two figures representing Sahadeva and Nakula, Yudhisthira standing between them balancing scales, dramatic mythological composition, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But the wise saw beyond emotion. A king must preserve balance, not follow temporary convenience.
scenes.image_prompt: Yudhisthira standing tall, wise old sage appearance, glowing divine light, traditional Pattachitra painting style, heavy borders, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: He chose Nakula - not from preference, but from principle. Fairness to both brothers was his dharma.
scenes.image_prompt: The Yaksha glowing with soft light, gesturing towards the bodies, Yudhisthira in deep thought, classic Indian art composition, heavy borders like a comic panel, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Without hesitation, Yudhisthira chose his step-brother. A ruler's duty to fairness proved his ultimate wisdom.
scenes.image_prompt: Yudhisthira pointing to the body of Nakula who is slowly breathing, Yudhisthira's face resolute, dramatic shadowing, final comic panel style fading to black, vertical 1080x1920
